D:\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\AccountManagement.dir/objects.a
D:\MinGW64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\AccountManagement.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\AccountManagement.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\MinGW64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\AccountManagement.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bin\AccountManagement.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib\libAccountManagement.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\AccountManagement.dir\linkLibs.rsp
